# Generated Architecture Tests

**WARNING: DO NOT EDIT FILES IN THIS DIRECTORY**

This directory contains automatically generated architecture tests created by the ADE (Architectural Decision Enforcement) tool from the rule files located in `docs/architecture-decision-log/*.rule`.

## How These Tests Are Generated

These tests are generated by:
```bash
./ade.exe compile -i ./docs/architecture-decision-log/*.rule -o ./rules -p csharp
```

The generated files are then copied here as part of the CI/CD pipeline.

## Modifying Architecture Rules

To modify architecture rules:
1. Edit the `.rule` files in `docs/architecture-decision-log/`
2. Regenerate tests using the ADE tool
3. The CI/CD pipeline will automatically regenerate and run these tests

## Manual Test Generation

To regenerate tests manually:
```powershell
# Generate all tests
@('0004', '0005', '0006', '0009', '0010', '0014', '0015', '0016', '0017') | ForEach-Object { 
    ./ade.exe compile -i ".\docs\architecture-decision-log\$_.rule" -o ./rules -p csharp 
}

# Copy to test project
Copy-Item -Path "rules/*.g.cs" -Destination "src/Tests/ArchTests/Generated/" -Force
```

## What These Tests Enforce

| ADR  | Description                   | Test File            |
| ---- | ----------------------------- | -------------------- |
| 0004 | Module structure (5 modules)  | ADR_0004_csharp.g.cs |
| 0005 | Single REST API module        | ADR_0005_csharp.g.cs |
| 0006 | API facade pattern            | ADR_0006_csharp.g.cs |
| 0009 | 2-layer CQRS for reads        | ADR_0009_csharp.g.cs |
| 0010 | Clean Architecture for writes | ADR_0010_csharp.g.cs |
| 0014 | Module isolation via events   | ADR_0014_csharp.g.cs |
| 0015 | In-memory event bus           | ADR_0015_csharp.g.cs |
| 0016 | IoC container per module      | ADR_0016_csharp.g.cs |
| 0017 | Architecture tests existence  | ADR_0017_csharp.g.cs |
